---
title: "RevealJS Social"
subtitle: "Quarto Extension"
description: "A Quarto extension that adds Open Graph and Twitter (X) social-card meta tags to RevealJS presentations."
author:
  - name: "MickaĂ«l CANOUIL, _Ph.D._"
    orcid: "0000-0002-3396-4549"
    url: "https://mickael.canouil.fr"
lang: en-GB
site-url: "https://m.canouil.dev/quarto-revealjs-social/"
image: "quarto-revealjs-social.png"
open-graph:
  site-name: "Quarto Extensions"
  image-width: 1200
  image-height: 630
  image-alt: "Social Reveal.js Card"
format:
  revealjs:
    output-file: index
    embed-resources: false
filters:
  - social
---

## Social cards for slides

This deck injects Open Graph and Twitter (X) `<meta>` tags into the `<head>`.

Inspect the rendered `index.html`: the `<head>` contains `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:image`, `og:url`, and the matching `twitter:*` tags.

## Metadata resolution

Values come from the standard Quarto keys (`title`, `description`, `image`, `open-graph`, `twitter-card`, `site-url`).

Scoped `extensions.social.*` options override them when set.

## Resource discovery

`image` is a local path (`quarto-revealjs-social.png`).

The filter registers it with `quarto.doc.add_resource` so Quarto copies the file on publish, and builds an absolute `og:image` URL from `site-url`.
